tracking.controllers: Any SteamVR-compatible (sold separately — no bundled controllers)

knownIssues.title: Ships without controllers — you must source them separately
knownIssues.description: The MeganeX Superlight 8K is sold as a display-focused HMD. No controllers are bundled. You need to add Valve Index knuckles, Vive Wands, or use hand tracking.
knownIssues.workaround: Pair with Lighthouse 2.0 base stations + Valve Index controllers for the best experience. Alternatively use Ultraleap hand tracking (not bundled).

knownIssues.title: 185g ultralight body — fit is unusually sensitive
knownIssues.description: The extreme weight reduction means the strap and face pad have less inertia to overcome. Minor adjustments that would be imperceptible on a heavier headset produce noticeable optical shift.
knownIssues.workaround: Spend time on the first fit. Tilt the headset so the optical sweet spot aligns with pupil distance; the ultra-small exit pupil is less forgiving than larger headsets.

knownIssues.title: DisplayPort 1.4 DSC must be supported end-to-end
knownIssues.description: 3840×3552 per eye @ 120 Hz exceeds DisplayPort 1.4 without DSC compression. Any adapter, hub, or cable that breaks DSC causes the headset to fall back to lower modes.
knownIssues.workaround: Connect direct to GPU DisplayPort 1.4 output. No adapters, no KVMs, no hubs. Verify DSC is active via SteamVR's resolution/Hz display.

optimizationTips.tip: Lower SteamVR supersampling to 60-70% — the native panel is already 8K combined
optimizationTips.simpleExplanation: With 3840×3552 per eye the default SteamVR supersampling is overkill. Reduce it to free up GPU headroom without losing perceived sharpness.
optimizationTips.advancedExplanation: SteamVR → Video → Render Resolution → Manual → 60-70%. The MeganeX's pixel density is high enough that perceptual sharpness plateaus; GPU cycles are better spent on anti-aliasing and shader detail.

optimizationTips.tip: OpenXR Toolkit FSR + CAS is a near-free quality upgrade
optimizationTips.simpleExplanation: OpenXR Toolkit adds hardware-agnostic FSR upscaling, which matters at this resolution.
optimizationTips.advancedExplanation: Install OpenXR Toolkit. FSR Quality at 80% render scale generally outperforms native 100% in both FPS and perceptual sharpness thanks to CAS sharpening.
